title: Remove nonexistent --set arg from runlabel documentation
body: As far as I can tell from looking through the git history of `cmd/podman/runlabel.go`, there never was a `--set` option.  I'm not sure why it was in the documentation for the command.

comments.body: Done.  The commit now has the proper field.

@edsantiago We have a test that makes sure that all options in podman help are in man pages, I believe,  Perhaps we need a check to go the other way also, to catch things like this.

@coandco Thanks for the PR.
